description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, set on a green base representing a lawn or yard. The structure features a flat, light-colored roof with two darker, raised sections on either side, and a prominent front entrance with a small overhang. The front facade includes a central door flanked by windows, and a paved walkway leads from the entrance to the edge of the property. There are several cubic trees symmetrically placed on either side of the house, and a small red car is parked on the lawn. The rear of the bungalow has a large window, suggesting a living area with ample natural light. The overall design is simple and modern, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, central entrance, and symmetrical landscaping, set on a green lawn with a walkway and a parked car.
description_view_0: Side view showing the length of the bungalow, the paved walkway, and the car parked near the edge of the lawn.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the central entrance, symmetrical windows, and trees flanking the walkway.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rear window, the full length of the walkway, and the car positioned on the lawn.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a large window and the symmetrical placement of trees at the back of the bungalow.
